name: Lily Cookies#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter (or shortening) and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the flour, mixing well to form a dough.
3. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
4. Using a 22-inch round cutter, cut out cookie shapes.
5. Bring the rounded edges of each cookie together and overlap them slightly.
6. Gently press the edges to create a lily shape.
7. Fill the open part of each cookie with jelly or jam.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes.
9. Dust the cooled cookies with powdered sugar.
Yields approximately 6 dozen cookies.
